title: tragopogon neglectus
intro: Tragopogon neglectus, also known as yellow salsify or common salsify, is a perennial plant native to Europe and Asia, characterized by its yellow flowers and edible roots. The roots of the Tragopogon neglectus plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with consuming Tragopogon neglectus include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and potentially lowering blood pressure. Tragopogon neglectus is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and can be consumed raw or cooked as a vegetable.
